title: Endless Winter
description: A very difficult survival modpack held in a desolate winter world
body:
![Banner](https://file.garden/ZM19cC0EPHK4dlbA/banner%20mc.gif)

Endless Winter [V1.0.0] is a very challenging survival modpack where you survive in a desolate and cold world. It features a **stamina system**, harsh **temperature mechanics**, **creepy ambiance** and more.

**Also shaders are VERY recommended.**
## Recommended shaders: (Iris Shaders)
* [MC VHS](https://modrinth.com/shader/mc-vhs)
* [Cursed Fog](https://modrinth.com/shader/cursed-fog)

## Tips:
Make a **campfire** as fast as possible, as it regenerates your health and warms you. You can also burn yourself to heat up faster. Make sure to place it under a roof or it'll burn out.

![Campfire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fca303e8302f66f50cf6c91506c5abfbf3d9cd7_0.webp)

Make a base (underground base recommended) and get a light source ASAP, as the night is **pitch black**.

![Pitch Black](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53e7e3c4c2458b4f0fbab73b4cc4e6d9045c56ef_0.webp)

Food is a big problem. You can **cook rotten flesh** to get a reliable food source.

![Baked flesh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac7fe20d8571835397acdf5c531e747fe473f0ea.png)

You'll eventually get lost, as there are **no coordinates**, so make sure to highlight your base!

![Highlighted base](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/334b0aa59c81b15e222d9cb17f9ed6dcd6379cb9_0.webp)


(Worlds might take long to generate)

If you want to play with friends download the [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) and host a world.
